user.title: Log in to AGL
user.description:
Open the URL below in your browser and log in with your AGL credentials. After login you will see a 'Not Found' page -- copy the full URL from the address bar and paste it in the field below.

`{authorize_url}`

data.callback_url: Callback URL (from address bar after login)

select_contract.title: Select contract
select_contract.description: Multiple electricity contracts were found. Select the one to monitor.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed or callback URL is invalid. Try opening the authorize URL again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach AGL. Check your internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This AGL contract is already configured.
